name: 8oz 6pk Plastic Solid Kids' Tumblers - Pillowfort™: Stackable, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, Ages 3+
description: Serve your kid their favorite drinks in this 6-Pack of Solid Plastic Tumblers from Pillowfort™. Made from a BPA-free material, these tumblers are great for enjoying a variety of cold beverages. This pack includes six tumblers, each showcasing a vibrant solid hue to let them pick their favorite color. Microwave safe for reheating only, you can toss them in the dishwasher for easy cleanup.
